title: Garden Route High matriculant plans to pursue studies in accounting, law
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Although it was a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Although it was a difficult year for Garden Route High School matriculant Sophumelela Sidumo, he was announced as the school's second top achiever on Tuesday 13 January, thanks to his final matric exams.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Although it was a difficult year for Garden Route High School matriculant Sophumelela Sidumo, he was announced as the school's second top achiever on Tuesday 13 January, thanks to his final matric exams."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Sidumo told Mossel Bay Advertiser 2025 was a tough year because of all of the pressure, especially to keep his spot as the top achiever throughout."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said he had been expecting to be either the top performer, or at least second.","html":"He said he had been expecting to be either the top performer, or at least second."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sidumo said his teachers and the principal, Edgar Gelembe, had helped him throughout the year to keep up his marks.","html":"Sidumo said his teachers and the principal, Edgar Gelembe, had helped him throughout the year to keep up his marks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He plans on beginning his studies in BCom accounting at the University of Johannesburg and, once completed, he would like to study law at the University of the Western Cape.","html":"He plans on beginning his studies in BCom accounting at the University of Johannesburg and, once completed, he would like to study law at the University of the Western Cape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Garden Route High matriculant plans to pursue studies in accounting, law
